description_long: This electric drill features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black and white color scheme accented by gold details. The body is streamlined, with a contoured handle that appears textured for grip, and a prominent trigger button on the side. The front end is fitted with a metallic, gold-colored chuck, currently holding a short, pointed drill bit. The top of the drill has a smooth, white casing with black and gold highlights, and the rear section is slightly raised, possibly for ergonomic support. No visible power cord or battery pack is present, suggesting a concealed or internal power source. The overall construction appears robust, with hard plastic and metal components, and no visible brand logo or ventilation slots.
description: A modern black, white, and gold electric drill with a textured handle, metallic chuck, and a short pointed drill bit. The design is sleek and robust, with no visible power source or brand logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing the contoured handle, trigger button, and gold-accented chuck with a drill bit attached.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed drill bit and the symmetrical, streamlined body of the drill.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle texture, trigger button, and the metallic chuck from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the drill and the alignment of the handle and body.
